license_evidence.license_label_detected: CC BY 4.0 default unless specifically labeled otherwise
license_evidence.modification_change_notice_requirement: CC BY 4.0 obligations apply; keep change notices in derived materials.
license_evidence.required_citation_text: The World Bank: World Development Indicators: data source if known; include dataset terms URL.

series_reviews.title: GDP growth (annual %)
series_reviews.long_definition: Gross domestic product is the total income earned through the production of goods and services in an economic territory during an accounting period. It can be measured in three different ways: using either the expenditure approach, the income approach, or the production approach. This indicator denotes the percentage change over each previous year of the constant price (base year 2015) series in United States dollars.
series_reviews.aggregation_estimation_note: National accounts revision/base-year risk; review before cross-domain comparison.
series_reviews.required_transform_before_backtest: None in v0.8.1; review notes before any internal backtest.

series_reviews.title: Unemployment, total (% of total labor force) (modeled ILO estimate)
series_reviews.source_organization: ILO Modelled Estimates database (ILOEST), International Labour Organization (ILO), uri: https://ilostat.ilo.org/data/bulk/, publisher: ILOSTAT, type: external database, date accessed: January 17, 2026
series_reviews.long_definition: Unemployment refers to the share of the labor force that is without work but available for and seeking employment.
series_reviews.aggregation_estimation_note: Modeled estimate detected; keep review before backtest claims.
series_reviews.required_transform_before_backtest: None in v0.8.1; review notes before any internal backtest.

series_reviews.title: Life expectancy at birth, total (years)
series_reviews.long_definition: Life expectancy at birth indicates the number of years a newborn infant would live if prevailing patterns of mortality at the time of its birth were to stay the same throughout its life.
series_reviews.aggregation_estimation_note: No transform applied; metadata still requires review before benchmark interpretation.
series_reviews.required_transform_before_backtest: None in v0.8.1; review notes before any internal backtest.

required_attribution: Source: World Bank World Development Indicators. Processing: DUAT local source pack. Include source URL and dataset terms URL.

answers.resolved_by_v0_8_1: v0.8.1 documents license terms, attribution, third-party caveat, per-series comparability and BacktestOpenGate.
answers.v0_9_limits: v0.9 may only be internal/dry-run if gates remain REVIEW; no public prediction, model claims, ranking, causality or electoral prediction.
